title: LDCL Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Lakshadweep Development Corporation (LDCL) Chief Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Lakshadweep Development Corporation . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the LDCL Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Degree or equivalent in Civil or Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institution along with relevant Harbour Engineering and port machinery experience are eligible to apply for these Chief Engineer vacancies. The application process for LDCL Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 01

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates: Relaxable by 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil or Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institution, 15 years experience in civil or mechanical engineering works including at least 10 years experience in the field of Harbour Engineering, Planning or Construction of harbours or maintenance and operation of different kinds of port machineries, Serving as Chief Engineer or in a post one level below
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Civil or Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University / Institution. 15 years of experience in civil or mechanical engineering works. At least 10 years of experience in the field of Harbour Engineering, Planning or Construction of harbours or maintenance and operation of different kinds of port machineries. Must be serving as Chief Engineer or in a post one level below.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria Document Verification Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for LDCL Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the LDCL Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the LDCL Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment is 01-06-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Chief Engineer (Civil) in the Lakshadweep Development Corporation (LDCL) as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for the Chief Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil or Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University or Institution to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Chief Engineer (Civil) post is 56 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a relaxation of 5 years in the maximum age limit for candidates belonging to Scheduled Tribe (ST) and Scheduled Caste (SC) categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Engineer (Civil) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,44,200/-.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the LDCL Chief Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete bio-data and required documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of selection for the Chief Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility criteria, followed by document verification and an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
